backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (theme, navigation, tab bar, home/search, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of key frontend source files to short descriptions of their roles in the Cheetah 1.0 app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom property tokens for colors, borders, charts, and sidebar used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app that loads Puter.js, CodeMirror (with multiple language modes and Dracula theme), and the Google Custom Search Engine script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full Cheetah 1.0 layout with header, tab bar, sidebar navigation, five page views, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor sub-tab using CodeMirror with HTML/CSS/JS/Python language support, localStorage persistence, a run button that renders output in an iframe, and a reset option.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder sub-tab with a slide list, per-slide title/body/color editor, keyboard-navigable fullscreen presentation mode, and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, app name/version, and a 'SECURE' status badge with a pulsing indicator.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Vertical sidebar navigation component with links to Home, Games, AI, Code, and Quick Open pages, plus keyboard shortcut hints at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: Horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with loading indicators, close buttons, and a new-tab button.
Renders the active tab's content as an iframe with loading overlay, an empty-state welcome screen, or an error panel if the page cannot be embedded.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: A generic React hook that syncs state with localStorage, supporting functional updaters and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: A custom hook managing browser-like tab state (open, close, switch, navigate) with URL normalization and proxy URL generation via allorigins, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/violet theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base layers, glassmorphism utilities, animated gradient backgrounds, and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: A homework AI assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to the Puter.js AI API, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of Q&A pairs to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: A page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) that renders the corresponding child component based on the active selection.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: A grid-based page displaying cards for educational and fun game sites (e.g., Math Playground, Scratch, Khan Academy) that open their URLs via a proxy when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: React component for the browser's home/search page, featuring an address bar with back/forward/refresh controls and a Globe icon, which loads URLs via a proxy into an iframe tab.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: React component displaying a grid of quick-access cards for popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, Wikipedia, Disney+, ChatGPT, Google Gemini) that open in a new proxy tab on click.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom amethyst/violet/magenta color palettes using OKLCH values, custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Rajdhani), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing Cheetah 1.0, a single-page proxy browser app with an amethyst theme, listing its architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements.
